sizing_rule.note: Fixed fractional position sizing: risk 1% of account equity per trade. Position size = (Account Equity × 0.01) / (Entry Price - Stop Price). Limits total account risk to fixed percentage regardless of trade setup.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions by calculating the number of shares or contracts that limits total account risk to a fixed percentage, determined by dividing the maximum acceptable risk amount by the per-unit loss at the stop level.
